metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — skills, agents, and commands used across the Grizzly Endeavors project family.

plugins.name: grizzly-tools
plugins.description: General-purpose toolkit useful on any project: reasoning lenses, debugging discipline, code craftsmanship, planning/process, and LLM-content authoring — plus supporting agents and commands.

plugins.name: grizzly-misc
plugins.description: Hyper-specific skills bound to a particular tool, engine, project, or environment: Bevy UI, PinchTab browser automation, Jules delegation, Residuum brand, and homelab deploys. Install only where relevant.
